creator: j.kelly.hays@gmail.com
text:
I have the same issue. Below is the tail of poudriere build log:

=> Attempting to fetch https://hackage.haskell.org/package/unix-compat-0.5.3/unix-compat-0.5.3.tar.gz

=> port manually into /portdistfiles/cabal and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
